use_case_name: Unpublish Firmware file on Local Controller.

structured.name: Unpublish Firmware file on Local Controller.
structured.objective: Stop the Local Controller from publishing a firmware update to Charging Stations.
structured.description: Stop serving a firmware update to connected Charging Stations.
scenario:
1. The CSMS sends an UnpublishFirmwareRequest to instruct the local controller to unpublish the
firmware.
2. The Local Controller unpublishes the firmware.
3. The local Controller responds with an UnpublishFirmwareResponse.
structured.prerequisites: A firmware successfully published by the Local Controller.
structured.postconditions:
Successful postcondition:
Firmware file no longer published.
Failure postcondition:
n/a
structured.remarks:
The CSMS uses a MD5 checksum over the entire firmware file as a unique identifier to indicate
which firmware file needs to be unpublished.

requirements.precondition:
If the Local Controller receives an
UnpublishFirmwareRequest
message AND
There is no ongoing download.
requirements.definition: The firmware file SHALL be unpublished.

requirements.precondition:
After successfully unpublishing the
firmware file.
requirements.definition:
The local controller SHALL send an UnpublishFirmwareResponse
message with status Unpublished.

requirements.precondition:
If the Local Controller receives an
UnpublishFirmwareRequest
message AND
There is no published file.
requirements.definition:
The Local Controller SHALL send an UnpublishFirmwareResponse
message with status NoFirmware.

requirements.precondition:
If the Local Controller receives an
UnpublishFirmwareRequest
message AND
If a Charging Station is downloading
the firmware file.
requirements.definition:
The Local Controller SHALL respond with the Downloading status AND not
unpublish the firmware file.

chunks.content:
# L04 - Unpublish Firmware file on Local Controller.

**Objective:** Stop the Local Controller from publishing a firmware update to Charging Stations.

**Description:** Stop serving a firmware update to connected Charging Stations.

**Actors:** Local Controller, CSMS

**Scenario:**
1. The CSMS sends an UnpublishFirmwareRequest to instruct the local controller to unpublish the
firmware.
2. The Local Controller unpublishes the firmware.
3. The local Controller responds with an UnpublishFirmwareResponse.

**Prerequisites:** A firmware successfully published by the Local Controller.

**Postconditions:** Successful postcondition:
Firmware file no longer published.
Failure postcondition:
n/a

**Remarks:** The CSMS uses a MD5 checksum over the entire firmware file as a unique identifier to indicate
which firmware file needs to be unpublished.

metadata.heading: L04 - Unpublish Firmware file on Local Controller.
metadata.use_case_name: Unpublish Firmware file on Local Controller.

chunks.content:
# L04 - Requirements

**L04.FR.01**
Precondition: If the Local Controller receives an
UnpublishFirmwareRequest
message AND
There is no ongoing download.
The firmware file SHALL be unpublished.

**L04.FR.02**
Precondition: After successfully unpublishing the
firmware file.
The local controller SHALL send an UnpublishFirmwareResponse
message with status Unpublished.

**L04.FR.03**
Precondition: If the Local Controller receives an
UnpublishFirmwareRequest
message AND
There is no published file.
The Local Controller SHALL send an UnpublishFirmwareResponse
message with status NoFirmware.

**L04.FR.04**
Precondition: If the Local Controller receives an
UnpublishFirmwareRequest
message AND
If a Charging Station is downloading
the firmware file.
The Local Controller SHALL respond with the Downloading status AND not
unpublish the firmware file.

metadata.heading: L04 - Requirements
metadata.use_case_name: Unpublish Firmware file on Local Controller.
